uplink.description: Full room reading: temperature 23.5 degC, humidity 48 %rH, CO2 620 ppm, VOC 12, setpoint dial 128, battery 1500 mV
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; raw values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (TEMP=23.5, RHUM=48, CO2=620, VOC=12, SETPOINT=128, VBAT=1500 mV), then normalized per this codec (battery mV/1000 -> V; VOC and setpoint as camelCase extras).
Synthetic in-bounds payload; raw values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (TEMP=23.5, RHUM=48).

uplink.description: Unrecognized Thermokon identifier returns an error
uplink._note: 0x77 is not a known data-point tag. Upstream silently aborts the parse and returns {}; this codec reports the unrecognized identifier instead.

uplink.description: Truncated CO2 value returns an error
uplink._note: Synthetic: 0x12 (CO2) tag with only one of its two value bytes present.
